betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The immutable foundation of Garden of Grind, unlikely to ever change*: Death.

It's an even that begins as soon as you spawn in. You have no choice BUT to fall to your death.



And if you ever find yourself on a block? I mean, you should probably set your home there, but other than that?

Kill yourself.



We are all prisoners in the circle of life, death, and rebirth, until we can escape this upside down reality back into the normal world by constucting and passing through a stargate. Unfortunately, the longer you take, the more robust the gate has to be, to account for the increasing instability and distance from home.

This guide contains some of the previous gates, and what they required. I'm sure you can see how much they have increased in cost and material requirements since the first...


§7*at least until I can figure out how to make a structure on first world load, that doesn't get removed by the disableModdedChunkPopulation§r
